overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with first-person walking through a neon-lit covered arcade lined with vending machines, transitioning to an outdoor urban sidewalk, then shifting to vehicle-mounted driving on a futuristic multi-level highway with holographic advertisements and dense cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with vending machines

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway, daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit corridor, passing rows of illuminated vending machines and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright red hair walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: dark geometric ceiling with green neon accent lighting along structural beams
row of red and black automated vending machines with illuminated product displays
large vertical digital screens displaying animated advertisements
continuous green and yellow neon tubes running along the ceiling edges

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a long, covered pedestrian arcade characterized by dark architectural elements and vibrant neon lighting. Rows of vending machines and digital billboards line the left wall while pedestrians walk through the corridor. The wooden plank flooring and geometric ceiling create a futuristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under elevated highway structures

events.description: exits the covered arcade into the open urban street environment
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the busy street

agents.ego_description: walking out of the building onto the city sidewalk and proceeding along the street

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving past on the street

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic
paved pedestrian walkway with yellow tactile guidance strips
tall modern street light with distinctive green striped base
tropical palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge
tall dark building with geometric paneling and large windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene transitions to an open urban environment with concrete sidewalks and palm trees. The camera walks along the street where vehicles pass by, passing under the shadow of massive elevated highway structures. The architecture shifts to towering futuristic buildings with glass and steel facades.

events.description: perspective shifts to vehicle-mounted camera, accelerating onto the highway
large holographic jellyfish advertisement materializes floating between buildings

agents.ego_description: driving a vehicle along the curved highway ramp, navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: silver van driving ahead in the same lane
black sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: massive elevated concrete highway structure with vehicles traveling on upper levels
large translucent blue holographic jellyfish floating in the air between buildings
towering glass and steel skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting accents
curved multi-lane road with yellow lane markings and safety barriers
orange and black striped safety barrier along the road edge
industrial steam exhaust rising from building ventilation systems

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a vehicle driving along a futuristic multi-level highway system. The camera navigates through traffic on a curving ramp, passing under massive overpasses and alongside towering skyscrapers. A prominent holographic jellyfish advertisement floats in the air, and industrial steam vents add to the cyberpunk atmosphere of the dense urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a neon-lit pedestrian arcade into a sprawling, multi-level futuristic cityscape. It begins by gliding through a covered corridor lined with vibrant vending machines and digital billboards, where dark geometric architecture frames the path. As the camera emerges from the walkway, the environment opens into a bright urban street with concrete sidewalks and palm trees, moving beneath the heavy shadows of massive elevated highway structures. The perspective then shifts seamlessly into a vehicle navigating a curving highway ramp, weaving through traffic amidst towering glass skyscrapers. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a dense industrial atmosphere filled with steam vents and a giant holographic jellyfish floating above the multi-layered road system.
